sentences.arabic: فَقَدْتُ طَرِيقِي وَأَنَا أَبْحَثُ عَنِ الْمَتْحَفِ الْوَطَنِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Izgubio sam se dok sam tražio Narodni muzej.
sentences.translationEn: I lost my way while looking for the National Museum.

sentences.arabic: فَتَحْتُ الْخَرِيطَةَ عَلَى هَاتِفِي الذَّكِيِّ لِأَعْرِفَ مَوْقِعِي.
sentences.translation: Otvorio sam mapu na svom pametnom telefonu da vidim gdje se nalazim.
sentences.translationEn: I opened the map on my smartphone to find my location.

sentences.arabic: مَشَيْتُ نَحْوَ الشَّمَالِ ثُمَّ انْعَطَفْتُ يَسَارًا عِنْدَ الْمَكْتَبَةِ.
sentences.translation: Hodao sam prema sjeveru, a zatim skrenuo lijevo kod biblioteke.
sentences.translationEn: I walked north and then turned left at the library.

sentences.arabic: وَصَلْتُ إِلَى الْمَتْحَفِ بَعْدَ عَشْرِ دَقَائِقَ فَقَطْ.
sentences.translation: Stigao sam u muzej nakon samo deset minuta.
sentences.translationEn: I arrived at the museum after only ten minutes.

sentences.translation: Mapa je bila jasna i jednostavna za korištenje.
sentences.translationEn: The map was clear and easy to use.
